# Iren's Dock

First mentioned: **3302-02-24**

## Biography

Iren's Dock orbited in the Manite system until the technological plague of early 3302 forced its closure. While other stations affected by Unknown Artefact interference were restored to operation through the application of meta-alloys by May 3302, Iren's Dock remained stubbornly dysfunctional, its services suspended long after Ackerman Market, Gabriel Enterprise and Weyn Dock had returned to normality.

The station's persistence on the list of closed facilities served as a stark reminder that the meta-alloy cure was neither universal nor immediately effective. A member of the technical team at Iren's Dock commented at the time that while people were being cautious about the new treatment, "if you ask me, it's worth a shot" — capturing both the hope and the uncertainty that characterised humanity's first encounter with Thargoid-related phenomena.
